pr.title: docs(skills): cite hooks by existence + purpose, not internal semantics
pr.summary: Apply a doctrine-shift across skills/: hook citations now make at most four claims (existence + path, event, failure mode prevented, escape-hatch acknowledgement). Removes redundant re-encoding of hook internals (env-var names, sentinel paths, cap counts, payload field names, deny-message tailoring, settings.json registration, postinstall mechanics, exit-code semantics, jq pattern internals) — the hook source files remain the canonical reference. Adds skills/element-interactions/references/harness-hooks.md as a one-line-per-hook discoverability index, grouped by event.
